## Meeting Purpose

## Topics

### Email Management Overhaul

  - [Implementing new AI-powered email tool to automatically categorize and label incoming messages](https://fathom.video/share/FsjyppJyPokengQ4PYUupSKipZu21gps?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Created custom labels: Legal/Contracts, Receipts, Investors, Notifications, To Respond, Waiting Reply](https://fathom.video/share/FsjyppJyPokengQ4PYUupSKipZu21gps?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Goal: Reduce inbox from 566 to near zero by archiving, labeling, or deleting](https://fathom.video/share/FsjyppJyPokengQ4PYUupSKipZu21gps?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [AI tool drafts responses; Marcel to review and send](https://fathom.video/share/FsjyppJyPokengQ4PYUupSKipZu21gps?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Dignory to clean up existing inbox, create filters, and maintain organization](https://fathom.video/share/FsjyppJyPokengQ4PYUupSKipZu21gps?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

### AI Growth Summit Planning

  - [Researching venues for 100-150 person event](https://fathom.video/share/FsjyppJyPokengQ4PYUupSKipZu21gps?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

  - [Budget-conscious approach: Aim for $400/hour or less](https://fathom.video/share/FsjyppJyPokengQ4PYUupSKipZu21gps?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [Consider food trucks for catering to reduce costs](https://fathom.video/share/FsjyppJyPokengQ4PYUupSKipZu21gps?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Bianca and Jason to be more involved in planning](https://fathom.video/share/FsjyppJyPokengQ4PYUupSKipZu21gps?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
